_about: BASF India job listings — public data collected from basf.jobs

_schema.job_id: Unique numeric identifier from the BASF job URL
_schema.name: Job title
_schema.location: City / location as shown on the posting
_schema.country: Full country name (always 'India' in this file)
_schema.job_type: Employment type (e.g. Permanent, Internship) — null if not shown
_schema.job_field: BASF job category (e.g. Engineering, R&D, Sales) — null if not shown
_schema.flexible_work: Work model (e.g. Hybrid, On-site, Remote) — null if not specified
_schema.description: First 100 characters of the English job description
_schema.url: Direct link to the BASF job posting
_schema.posted_at: Date the job was first posted (YYYY-MM-DD) — null if not available
_schema.scraped_at: Date this record was last fetched (YYYY-MM-DD)

jobs.name: Head - Legal & Company Secretary
jobs.job_field: Role Overview:BASF Agricultural Solutions India Limited is seeking an experienced Legal and Company Secretarial professional to lead corporate governance, regulatory compliance, legal advisory, litigation, contract management and stakeholder engagement, with a strong focus on listing readiness in India.Key Responsibilities:Regulatory Compliance &CorporateGovernanceLead compliance with Companies Act, SEBI regulations, Foreign Exchange laws, Secretarial Standards and other applicable corporate, data privacy, ESG and sector-specific regulations.Act as Key Managerial Personnel and provide governance support to the Board, Committees and senior management.Maintain governance frameworks, compliance calendars, internal controls and processes aligned with BASF corporate requirements.Related Party Transactions & Intercompany GovernanceOversee Related Party Transactions, including documentation, approvals, disclosures and compliance with applicable laws.Partner with finance, tax and business teams to mitigate governance, conflict-of-interest and intercompany transaction risks.License to Operate (LtO) – Regulatory / Compliance FrameworkSafeguard BASIL’s regulatory License to Operate through strong legal and compliance risk management, maintaining trust with investors, the Board and group stakeholders.Oversee legal and compliance aspects of environmental, safety and sustainability requirements, including BRSR, in collaboration with EHS and operations teams.Maintain effectivecompliancesystems,checklists and processesforcorporate, listing and relatedregulatory requirements.Legal Advisory, Litigation & Contract ManagementProvide legal advisory support on applicable laws, regulations, policies and business matters.Manage litigation, contracts, schemes, incentives, offers and legal risks, particularly in agro-chemicals.Support strategic projects and represent the business with regional and central legal teams as required.Stakeholder & Investor EngagementSupport investor relations, analyst and investor meetings, minority shareholder engagement and regulatory liaison.Interface with stock exchanges, MCA, ROC, auditors, regulatory authorities and BASF Group companies.Key Qualifications & Experience:Qualified Company SecretaryandLLBwith more than15 years’experience includingCompany Secretarial exposure in listed companies in India.Strong knowledge of Companies Act, SEBI regulations, Foreign Exchange laws, corporate governance, RPTs and stakeholder management.Experience in MNCs, manufacturing/process industries or agro-chemicals will be an advantage.Strong governance mindset, integrity and sound judgement.Strategic thinking with hands-on execution capability.Excellent communication, influencing skills and stakeholder management skills.Ability to work effectively in a global, matrixed and cross-cultural environment.
